text: Gazing through the glass at the vivid R+D display, I am struck by the contrast between sterile corridors and the promise of innovation beyond. The space feels contemplative yet alive—a liminal threshold between routine and discovery. Surrounded by the hum of technology and murmurs of research, I feel both a participant and an observer, poised between curiosity and anticipation, eager to step inside and engage with the ideas that shape our future.
